Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leo M. LaRocca, of Niven & Smith Law Offices, Tel. 415.981.5451, for plaintiffs;
Kevin P. Lee, of Tarkington, O'Neill, Barrack & Chong, Tel. 415.777.5501, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. Plaintiff John Riordan's Motion To Quash Subpoenas Served Upon Peninsula Orthopedic Associates is granted. Defendant's withdraw the subpoena duce tecum served upon Seton Medical Center, therefore; the Motion To Quash Subpoenas served upon Seton Medical Center is moot. The Request for Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Gregory J. Wimmer Under California Code Of Civil Procedure 2023.010 Et Seq is denied. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: A. Marisa Chun; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
